title: Review-Packet Manifest Route-Table Dry-Run Tool v0

sources.label: Review-Packet Builder Forbidden Input Fixture v0
Review-Packet Builder Route-Table Placeholder Fixture v0

limitations: Does not provide eligibility guidance, expanded-access guidance, monitoring guidance, or publication authorization for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not assemble review packets, generate biomedical prose, rewrite claims, rank evidence, match patients, select trials, or recommend therapies.
Reads public repository files only and requires no network, credentials, accounts, paid services, or private records.
Output is copied-reference routing, missing-input reporting, and refusal records only.
Route-table output is not expert review, source completeness, evidence strength, clinical importance, patient relevance, actionability, or publication readiness.
Refusal behavior is limited to explicit forbidden fields and missing public references; it does not sanitize private or real case data for use.
